sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]

Path('governance/reports/bem840_runner_capacity_vs_queue_diagnosis.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Runner Capacity vs Queue Diagnosis | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_runner_capacity_vs_queue_diagnosis.json','governance/reports/bem840_runner_capacity_vs_queue_diagnosis.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
